'''竏喘-sh-l-p''' ('''shabashlepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mythbust|mythbust]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-sh-l-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mythbust|mythbust]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喘-sh-l-p
|-
! Lemma
| shabashlepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibashlepoko|thibashlepoko]] || [[word:jibashlepoko|jibashlepoko]] || [[word:shibashlepoko|shibashlepoko]] || [[word:kibashlepoko|kibashlepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubashlepoko|thuthubashlepoko]] || [[word:jujubashlepoko|jujubashlepoko]] || [[word:shushubashlepoko|shushubashlepoko]] || [[word:kukubashlepoko|kukubashlepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubashlepoko|thubashlepoko]] || [[word:jubashlepoko|jubashlepoko]] || [[word:shubashlepoko|shubashlepoko]] || [[word:kubashlepoko|kubashlepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubashlepoko|thubashlepoko]] || [[word:jubashlepoko|jubashlepoko]] || [[word:shubashlepoko|shubashlepoko]] || [[word:kubashlepoko|kubashlepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebashlepoko|thebashlepoko]] || [[word:jebashlepoko|jebashlepoko]] || [[word:shebashlepoko|shebashlepoko]] || [[word:kebashlepoko|kebashlepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobashlepoko|thothobashlepoko]] || [[word:jojobashlepoko|jojobashlepoko]] || [[word:shoshobashlepoko|shoshobashlepoko]] || [[word:kokobashlepoko|kokobashlepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobashlepoko|thobashlepoko]] || [[word:jobashlepoko|jobashlepoko]] || [[word:shobashlepoko|shobashlepoko]] || [[word:kobashlepoko|kobashlepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobashlepoko|thobashlepoko]] || [[word:jobashlepoko|jobashlepoko]] || [[word:shobashlepoko|shobashlepoko]] || [[word:kobashlepoko|kobashlepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦbashlepoko|thﾃｦbashlepoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦbashlepoko|jﾃｦbashlepoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦbashlepoko|shﾃｦbashlepoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦbashlepoko|kﾃｦbashlepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabashlepoko|thathabashlepoko]] || [[word:jajabashlepoko|jajabashlepoko]] || [[word:shashabashlepoko|shashabashlepoko]] || [[word:kakabashlepoko|kakabashlepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabashlepoko|thabashlepoko]] || [[word:jabashlepoko|jabashlepoko]] || [[word:shabashlepoko|shabashlepoko]] || [[word:kabashlepoko|kabashlepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabashlepoko|thabashlepoko]] || [[word:jabashlepoko|jabashlepoko]] || [[word:shabashlepoko|shabashlepoko]] || [[word:kabashlepoko|kabashlepoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shabashlepithi|shabashlepithi]] || [[word:shabashlepiji|shabashlepiji]] || [[word:shabashlepishi|shabashlepishi]] || [[word:shabashlepiki|shabashlepiki]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shabashlepotho|shabashlepotho]] || [[word:shabashlepojo|shabashlepojo]] || [[word:shabashleposho|shabashleposho]] || [[word:shabashlepoko|shabashlepoko]]
|-

|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shabashlepﾃｯf|shabashlepﾃｯf]] || [[word:shabashlepﾃｯf|shabashlepﾃｯf]] || [[word:shabashlepﾃｯf|shabashlepﾃｯf]] || [[word:shabashlepﾃｯf|shabashlepﾃｯf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shabashlepﾃｯf|shabashlepﾃｯf]] || [[word:shabashlepﾃｯf|shabashlepﾃｯf]] || [[word:shabashlepﾃｯf|shabashlepﾃｯf]] || [[word:shabashlepﾃｯf|shabashlepﾃｯf]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shabashlepﾃｦthﾃｦ|shabashlepﾃｦthﾃｦ]] || [[word:shabashlepﾃｦjﾃｦ|shabashlepﾃｦjﾃｦ]] || [[word:shabashlepﾃｦshﾃｦ|shabashlepﾃｦshﾃｦ]] || [[word:shabashlepﾃｦkﾃｦ|shabashlepﾃｦkﾃｦ]]
|-

|-

|}

! Form !! Surface form
|-
